  "claims": [
    "The western monarch butterfly population in California has declined by more than 80% over the past 25 years.",
    "The population of western monarch butterflies dropped from 1.2 million to 233,000 in the last year.",
    "Protecting monarch butterflies contributes to the health of the entire ecosystem.",
    "The U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service has proposed protections for over 4,300 acres in California as critical monarch habitats.",
